howItWorks.intro: This loot drop probability calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

faq.question: How many tries for a 1% drop?
faq.answer: 69 attempts for 50% chance, 230 for 90%, 460 for 99%. The formula is attempts = ln(1-target) / ln(1-droprate). Even at 1% drop rate, it is NOT guaranteed in 100 tries.
